MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Keith D. Klein, Esq. represented Plaintiff, John Doe and Sarah Sevier Farnbach, Esq. represented Signatures Network. The file is under seal and the hearing took place in chambers. Order signed .
